text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The new year has come and Mejiro Bright's senior
year starts today. A pivotal time in her career is
about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've come to the shrine—our first visit of the
year—to pray for success. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, the line hasn't budged in the slightest,
has it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if we'll reach the front by the time I've
finished counting the needles on this pine branch
again?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The line isn't just moving slowly, it's at a complete
standstill.
choice_data_list: Should we give up and head home?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, Trainer. Haste makes waste, as they
say...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let's be patient and wait it out. I imagine the line
will start shuffling forward before we know it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure I can stand to wait any longer. If we
don't leave now, the sun will set...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It appears there are still quite a few people in
front of us. I do have an idea, though, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Since the hall of worship is in view, why don't we
get started with a few casual requests from our
current position?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, it can be just like partaking in appetizers
before the main course.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Just so! And I'm sure the divine will bless us with
something for waiting as long as we have...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no point just standing around waiting for
the time to pass. We might as well warm up with a
few prayers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready, Trainer? Let's say our prayers
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our spirits unite as one as we happen to make
exactly the same request:
choice_data_list:
Please let us get some good sleep while we
wait.
Please let this line start moving.
Please let the gods come to us instead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Please let us get some good sleep while we wait.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure whether it's divine influence or simply
her own willpower, but Mejiro Bright immediately
dozes off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaawn... Ah, I feel ever so refreshed... It seems the gods saw fit to grant my request.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Where are we, Trainer? It seems we've been
spirited away by some heavenly force...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You carried me? On your own? Why, thank you,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright looks better for the quality sleep
she got once we moved away from all the hustle
and bustle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pleeease let this line start moving.

text_block_list.name: Visitor
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! Keep movin' up, will ya? Can't you see
that empty space in front of you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Oh my...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a miracle. Someone somewhere must have
heard us because the line starts moving like
clockwork, and we find ourselves at the front in
no time at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee... After being thrust so abruptly into the
presence of the divine, I had no idea what to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The harder I tried to think of something, the
hazier my thoughts seemed to get...
choice_data_list: So what did you end up praying for?
So what did you end up praying for?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, in the end, I couldn't really think of
anything in particular...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
So I just prayed for "lots and lots of things to go
well."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That nonchalant request is just the kind of prayer
I'd expect from Mejiro Bright. That said, not long
after our shrine visit, I notice that a lot of things
seem to be going well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Please let the gods come to us instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"This would be over in a flash if the gods just
came to us." This is the wicked thought running
through my mind when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Stars above! Is that you, Bright? Come to visit the
shrine, have you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Because if you have, I'd be happy to guide you to
a better spot! It's far too crowded here! Come,
come!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Greetings, Fukukitaru. That would be
terrific, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you're hoping to pay homage to the divine, a
mountain creek like this will do just fine. As we all
know, the gods reside by rivers as well.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
In fact, the natural world plays host to a myriad
of divine spirits! Let's pay joyous tribute to as
many as we can!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Praying to a great many deities while enjoying a
stroll? Oh, how delightful! You're quite the
goddess of good fortune yourself, Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru takes us on a tour of all the
New Year power spots, and having learned a
great deal, we come away feeling as grateful for
her as for the gods themselves.
